tbm_grant_air_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2032 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            }
            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2036 = yes
        }

}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_fighter - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cv_early_fighter - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_early_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_early_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { jet_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aa_cannon_3 - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_cannon_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # jet_fighter2 - 1950

                NOT = { has_tech = jet_fighter2 }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_fighters_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fighter1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # scout_plane1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "La Resistance"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # iw_small_airframe - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_small_airframe - 2028

                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_tech = CAS3
                has_tech = fighter3

            }
            set_technology = { fighter4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = fighter6 }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

    }
}
# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) --

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=2020 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=2028 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=2032 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # heavy_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # heavy_fighter2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_fighter2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (3 techs) --

# naval_bomber1
#   year=2000 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=2024 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=2032 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # naval_bomber1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (13 techs) --

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=2000 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=2020 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=2020 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=2028 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber4
#   year=2032 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=2032 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers

            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # reinforced_wings_mothership - 1942

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = reinforced_wings_mothership }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { aerial_hangars = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (7 techs) --

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=2000 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=2018 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=2024 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber4
#   year=2024 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # early_bomber - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2024 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { tactical_bomber4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=2033 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_nanomachines
#   year=2035 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2015 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2015 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2019 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2019 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2023 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2025 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2029 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2031 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2035 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = computing_machine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_encryption - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_decryption - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_decryption }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_computing_machine }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { improved_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_computing_machine - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_computing_machine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_encryption - 1942

                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                NOT = { has_dlc = "La Resistance" }
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 2015
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics

            set_technology = { tech_20_nanometer_mosfet = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # radio - 2015

                NOT = { has_tech = radio }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2015 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2023 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # petascale_computing - 2023
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = petascale_computing }
                NOT = { has_tech = early_quantum_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { petascale_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_quantum_computing - 2023
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_quantum_computing }
                NOT = { has_tech = petascale_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { early_quantum_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            set_technology = { tech_10000_qubit_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2033 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_nanomachines - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_nanomachines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { basic_nanomachines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2035 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_nanomachines - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_nanomachines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_nanomachines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
