tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2023 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2025 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2029 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2031 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2035 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # land_fort_tech_1 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = land_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { land_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # land_fort_tech_2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = land_fort_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { land_fort_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_machine_tools - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry - 2020
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_silos - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_silos }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_silos = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # synth_oil_experiments - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = synth_oil_experiments }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { synth_oil_experiments = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction1 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # excavation1 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2021 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_machine_tools - 2021
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry2 - 2021
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry2 }
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry2 - 2021

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry2 }
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # oil_processing - 2021

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { oil_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rubber_processing - 2021

                NOT = { has_tech = rubber_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { rubber_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # construction2 - 2021

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2029 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # industrial_software - 2029
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { industrial_software = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_equipment_conversion - 2029
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_equipment_conversion }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_equipment_conversion = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry6 - 2029

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry6 - 2029
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_oil_processing - 2029
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_oil_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_rubber_processing - 2029
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rubber_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction7 - 2031
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction7 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2033 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # industrial_software3 - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { industrial_software3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry8 - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry8 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry8 - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry8 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # modern_oil_processing - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_oil_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { modern_oil_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # modern_rubber_processing - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_rubber_processing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { modern_rubber_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction8 - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction8 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2035 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # industrial_software4a - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software4a }
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software4b }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { industrial_software4a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # industrial_software4b - 2035
        else_if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software4b }
                NOT = { has_tech = industrial_software4a }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { industrial_software4b = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry9 - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry9 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry9 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # dispersed_industry9 - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry9 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry9 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # fuel_refining5 - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { fuel_refining5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # construction9 - 2035
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction9 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction9 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (15 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactors
#   year=2019 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# energy_farms
#   year=2019 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactors1
#   year=2023 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# energy_farms1
#   year=2023 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactors2
#   year=2027 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# energy_farms2
#   year=2027 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactors3
#   year=2031 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# energy_farms3
#   year=2031 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactors4
#   year=2035 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# energy_farms4
#   year=2035 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2019 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2019 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2023 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2031 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2035 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # atomic_research - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            set_technology = { isotope_separation_centrifugal = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (12 techs) --

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio_detection
#   year=2019 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# decimetric_radar
#   year=2021 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decimetric_radar
#   year=2023 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=2025 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_centimetric_radar
#   year=2027 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_centimetric_radar
#   year=2029 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_quantum_radar
#   year=2031 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_quantum_radar
#   year=2033 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_quantum_radar
#   year=2035 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2019 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2019 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2023 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2023 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2025 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2029 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2029 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2031 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2031 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2035 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2035 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # cavity_magnatron - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { cavity_magnatron = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (19 techs) --

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[rocket_artillery]

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery
#   year=2006 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=2018 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# suicide_drone_tech1
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=2024 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# suicide_drone_tech2
#   year=2024 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=2027 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# suicide_drone_tech3
#   year=2028 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# suicide_drone_tech4
#   year=2032 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # motorized_rocket_unit - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # experimental_rockets - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = experimental_rockets }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { experimental_rockets = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 [XP_GATED]
