#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank7
#   year=2033 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank8
#   year=2036 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2022 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2030 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2036 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mountain_tanks - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { mountain_tanks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { SWE_bofors_antitank_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): air_superiority
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): infrastructure_destruction
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): home_defence
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): naval_strike_tactics
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fighter_sweeps
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): dogfighting_experience
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): multialtitude_flying
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): logistical_bombing
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): day_bombing
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): massed_bomber_formations
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): air_offense
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): offensive_formations
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mass_destruction
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): formation_flying
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): dive_bombing
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): direct_ground_support
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): formation_fighting
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fighter_ace_initiative
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): hunt_and_destroy
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): combat_unit_destruction
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): battlefield_support
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): keypoint_bombing
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ground_support_integration
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): naval_strike_torpedo_tactics
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): strategic_destruction
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): forward_interception
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): asymetrical_warfare
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): human_wave
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): indiscriminate_conscription
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): hit_and_run
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): raiding_parties
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): rat_tunnels
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): media_propaganda
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): decapitation_strike
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): command_and_control
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): technical_conversion
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): scavage_enemy_vehicles
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): pocket_defence_asym
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): scorched_earth_asym
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): peoples_war
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mechanized_
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
        }
        # sp_centrifugal_jet_tech - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_centrifugal_jet_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_centrifugal_jet_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # aa_lmg - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_lmg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # engines_1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # photo_reconnaisance - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { photo_reconnaisance = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # aa_hmg - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_hmg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aa_cannon_1 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aa_cannon_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # engines_2 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=2000 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=2021 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair8
#   year=2036 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2030 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2036 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # railway_gun - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { railway_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }
        # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = antiair7 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { antiair7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y2036 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # antiair8 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = antiair8 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { antiair8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) --

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_heavy_tank - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_heavy_tank_chassis - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }

        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks

                NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_heavy_tank - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech - 1943

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
        }
        # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons4
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_rifle_upgrade6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_rifle_upgrade7
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# body_armor4
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# camouflage4
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# extreme_environment_training
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# survival_training
#   year=2024 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_rifle_upgrade8
#   year=2026 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# body_armor5
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers3
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines3
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers3
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_rangers3
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# elite_forces
#   year=2027 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons5
#   year=2030 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# body_armor6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# camouflage5
#   year=2030 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# upgraded_infantry_weapons3
#   year=2033 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_rifle_upgrade9
#   year=2033 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# body_armor7
#   year=2033 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons6
#   year=2036 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# body_armor8
#   year=2036 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# camouflage6
#   year=2036 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

tbm_grant_land_infantry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2003 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2003 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2009 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2009 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2026 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2026 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2030 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2033 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2036 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
        }
        # rangers_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
                has_dlc = "No Compromise, No Surrender"
            }
            set_technology = { rangers_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # improved_infantry_weapons - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rangers_tech2 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { rangers_tech2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # improved_infantry_weapons_2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { improved_infantry_weapons_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_at - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_at = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_infantry_weapons - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_at2 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_at2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # rangers_tech3 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { rangers_tech3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # infantry_rifle_upgrade - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_rifle_upgrade = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # support_weapons - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # body_armor - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # camouflage - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # marines - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_mountaineers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_rangers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_rangers }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_rangers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # paratroopers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
                has_tech = utility_helicopter_1
            }
            set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2003 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2003 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2003 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2006 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons2 - 2006
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # support_weapons2 - 2006
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # camouflage2 - 2006
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
