            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade9 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_rifle_upgrade9 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # body_armor7 - 2033
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor7 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2036 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons6 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # body_armor8 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor8 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # camouflage6 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage6 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (12 techs) --

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2018 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2022 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank4
#   year=2032 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2022 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
        }
        # gwtank - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
        }
        # basic_light_tank - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MECHANISED (17 techs) --

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry1]

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry3]

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry4]

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=2027 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry4
#   year=2027 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry5
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2036 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanised_infantry1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # light_mechanized_infantry1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
                has_tech = mechanised_infantry1
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2012 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry2 - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # light_mechanized_infantry2 - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
                has_tech = mechanised_infantry3
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2021 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 - 2021
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanised_infantry3 - 2021
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # light_mechanized_infantry3 - 2021
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2024 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 - 2024

                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
                has_tech = mechanised_infantry4
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2027 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry4 - 2027

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y2036 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised

            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanised_infantry5 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised

            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # light_mechanized_infantry5 - 2036
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (6 techs) --

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=2020 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=2024 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2024 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
        }
        # basic_medium_tank - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) --

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=2032 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1945 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
        }
        # main_battle_tank - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y2032 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # main_battle_tank_chassis - 2032

                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_modern_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

# -- LAND / MOTORISED (4 techs) --

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=2024 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry3
#   year=2036 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_land_motorised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2036 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y2036 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision6
#   year=2033 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2022 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2026 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2026 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2027 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2027 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2032 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2033 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y2033 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_recon_focus_bonus - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_recon_focus_bonus = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sp_armored_engineer_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_engineer_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_armored_maintenance_tech - 1938

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            set_technology = { sp_armored_signal_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech - 1938

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_helicopter_transport_pods_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_support - 2018
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_train - 2018
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_land_support_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_fast_rope_drills - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_fast_rope_drills }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # tech_improved_gps - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_improved_gps }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_improved_gps = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_field_hospital - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_logistics_company3 - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_signal_company3 - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support_y2032 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers4 - 2032
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_logistics_company4 - 2032
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_signal_company4 - 2032
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support

            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2021 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2021 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2022 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2022 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2032 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2038 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2038 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "La Resistance"
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "La Resistance"
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_tank - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # armored_car2 - 1940

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_heavy_spaa - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # sp_armored_advanced_flamethrower_tech - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_advanced_flamethrower_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_advanced_flamethrower_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
