tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # main_battle_tank2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

        # amphibious_tank1 - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_tank_chassis - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # auto_loader_tech - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = auto_loader_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { auto_loader_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # armor_tech_2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # main_battle_tank3 - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_drive - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_drive }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_drive = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_tank2 - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_tech = light_tank3
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (16 techs) --

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battleship
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_advanced_super_heavy
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_battleship
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2028 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # early_battlecruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # basic_battlecruiser - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_heavy - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_battleship - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_heavy - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # ship_hull_super_heavy - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
        # basic_battleship - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # heavy_battleship - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2024 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_ship_hull_heavy - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # ship_hull_advanced_super_heavy - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_advanced_super_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_advanced_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
        # improved_battleship - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y2028 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_heavy - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_battleship - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # heavy_battleship2 - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (10 techs) --

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y2028 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }
        # sp_refined_pykrete - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_refined_pykrete = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }
        # sp_ice_composite_runawayas - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_ice_composite_runawayas = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- NAVAL / DESTROYERS (17 techs) --

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_sonar
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sonar
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_destroyer
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_sonar
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_destroyer
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2028 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # advanced_sonar - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # smoke_generator - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
        # sonar - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_destroyer - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { improved_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {

# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (4 techs) --

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2028 = yes
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {

# basic_naval_mines
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# damage_control_1
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# damage_control_2
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# damage_control_3
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# modern_naval_mines
#   year=2034 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2026 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2026 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2032 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2034 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2034 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # basic_naval_mines - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_1
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_2
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): damage_control_3
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_1
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_2
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): fire_control_methods_3
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_multi_product_supply_ships
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # basic_battery - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_torpedo - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # submarine_mine_laying - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { submarine_mine_laying = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mtg_transport - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mtg_transport }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { mtg_transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # transport - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = transport }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # basic_light_battery - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_battery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_light_shell - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_shell }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_shell = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_medium_battery - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_battery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_heavy_battery - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_battery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # big_gun_tech - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = big_gun_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { big_gun_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): magnetic_detonator
        # improved_ship_torpedo_launcher - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_torpedo_launcher }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_ship_torpedo_launcher = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_naval_mines - 2020

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # modern_naval_mines - 2034
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2034 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (14 techs) --

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_nuclear_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[electric_torpedo]

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_nuclear_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[electric_torpedo]

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_submarine
#   year=2028 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2028 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_improved_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = {
    if = {

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_submarine - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_submarine - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_ship_hull_nuclear_submarine - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_nuclear_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_tech = electric_torpedo
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_nuclear_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_submarines_y2028 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_submarine - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
        # advanced_submarine - 2028
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_submarines
                NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
